text.div:
Id: IMMZD18STBEEncepur
Url: IMMZ.D18.S.TBE.Encepur schedule
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D18.S.TBE.Encepur schedule
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-03 13:07:11+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D18.S.TBE.Encepur schedule Encepur, 3-dose schedule
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD18STBEEncepurLogic
Actions:
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: The vaccine can be given from > 1 year of age.
If: Applicability: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 (Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })
TBE Encepur dose 2: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 2 Trigger event: First TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: An interval of 1–3 months is recommended between the first 2 doses.
If: Applicability: TBE Encepur dose 2 (TBE Encepur dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })
TBE Encepur dose 3: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 3 Trigger event: Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: For Encepur, the requirement is 9–12 months between doses 2 and 3.
If: Applicability: TBE Encepur dose 3 (TBE Encepur dose 3)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur dose 3 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })
TBE Encepur booster dose: Provision of the TBE Encepur booster dose Trigger event: The primary series has been completed Trigger pseudo: "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Trigger date: "Date when primary vaccination series was completed" Create condition: The manufacturer recommends a booster dose to be administered 3 years after completion of the primary series.
If: Applicability: TBE Encepur booster dose (TBE Encepur booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur booster dose Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString:
/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today

/*
@internal: TBE containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "TBE Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."TBE vaccines"
TBE Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of TBE Primary Series Doses Administered
Two TBE primary series doses were administered
Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered
Three TBE primary series doses were administered
Third TBE dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
One TBE primary series dose was administered
First TBE dose from the primary series was administered
No TBE primary series doses were administered
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 Due Date
TBE Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of TBE Booster Series Doses Administered
At least one booster dose was administered
TBE Encepur booster dose Due Date

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series
 */
define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

action.title: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1
action.description:
Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 1
Trigger event: Child's birth
Trigger pseudo: 
Trigger date: "Date of birth"
Create condition: The vaccine can be given from > 1 year of age.

action.title: TBE Encepur dose 2
action.description:
Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 2
Trigger event: First TBE dose from the primary series was administered
Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1
Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines")
Create condition: An interval of 1–3 months is recommended between the first 2 doses.

action.title: TBE Encepur dose 3
action.description:
Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 3
Trigger event: Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered
Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2
Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines")
Create condition: For Encepur, the requirement is 9–12 months between doses 2 and 3.

action.title: TBE Encepur booster dose
action.description:
Provision of the TBE Encepur booster dose
Trigger event: The primary series has been completed
Trigger pseudo: "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines")
Trigger date: "Date when primary vaccination series was completed"
Create condition: The manufacturer recommends a booster dose to be administered 3 years after completion of the primary series.
